summary: Fixed two compile errors in notification_service.dart caused by API changes in flutter_local_notifications v22. In v22, both initialize() and show() switched to named-only parameters. Fixed: (1) initialize() now uses 'settings:' named param instead of positional arg; (2) show() now uses 'id:', 'title:', 'body:', 'notificationDetails:' named params instead of positional args. Build should now succeed.
current_status: Flutter driver app compile errors resolved. The notification_service.dart is updated to match flutter_local_notifications v22 API. App is ready to build and run.
